{{Infobox character
| name = Emperor (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
| name = Emperor (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| aliases = The Emperor (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Emperor, Aurelian Emperor, original Heartlander, father of every bloodline, father of the Empire, symbol of Imperial stability and civilization de facto ruler of the Aurelian Empire de facto moral compass for the Guild de facto Liberator
| abilities = Reader, Awaken gravel, sense the memories and potential in objects, bind himself to the heart of a Great Elder, emits an aura of madness, uses an invested pillow to put people to sleep, invested with Intent, exploring the possibilities of Intent, bring inanimate objects to life, words carry such Intent that it is impossible to ignore de facto use of Intent to halt an Elder de facto use of forceful Intent to destroy things de facto flex his Intent to cause sources of flame to flare to life de facto active Reading de facto hide Intent from Reading
| affiliations = Aurelian Empire, the Guild
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

''See also: [[Emperor (The Elder Empire: Shadow) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor is the foundational figure and symbol of stability, civilization, and human goodness within the Empire. As a man possessing actual memories of the era when [[Great Elders]] ruled the world, he is the only living individual capable of [[binding]] himself to a [[Great Elder]]'s heart without succumbing to madness. His longevity is derived from a [[Great Elder]], and he has previously survived direct confrontations with their creator. He sought to establish an eternal empire of warriors capable of resisting the [[Elders]]' return, aiming to build a world that could eventually thrive independently of his rule. To maintain control and monitor the [[Great Elders]], [[the Emperor]] utilized a global network of receptors connected to his personal throne, the [[Optasia]]. This device allowed him to predict and counter threats across the world, though using it carries the risk of allowing the [[Elders]] to influence him. He is currently engaged in a long-term struggle against entities like Ach’magut, whose vast, timeless plans involve using [[the Emperor]] as a piece in a cosmic game. Despite his immense power and status, which places him above other specialized individuals like [[Readers]] or the [[Soulbound]], he remains a figure caught in a multi-century conflict against the influence of the [[Dead Mother]] and her children.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|As the ruler of the [[Aurelian Empire]] and a Reader, [[the Emperor]] serves as the father of every bloodline and the symbol of imperial civilization. Throughout his thousand-year life, he has maintained stability by [[binding]] himself to the hearts of [[Great Elders]] and possessing living memories of them. He has demonstrated immense power, including the ability to [[Awaken]] gravel, sense the potential in objects, and perform feats such as dissolving a teacup with his will. During various encounters, he compensated [[Ulrich Fletcher]], signed the release for [[Baldezar Kern]], and authorized alchemical treatments. His combat history includes killing [[Nakothi]] with a spear, breaking [[Lucan]]'s legs, and engaging [[Shera]] with ancient blades invested with [[Intent]]. Ultimately, his death sparked a desire for anarchy throughout the Empire.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor compensated [[Ulrich Fletcher]] for his lost business.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The client is [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor signed the release for [[Baldezar Kern]] to take the field.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor is the ruler of the [[Aurelian Empire]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor is a Reader.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor is described as the original [[Heartlander]] and the father of every bloodline.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor has a scar running down his forehead to his nose.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor gave permission for the alchemists' treatments.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor can [[Awaken]] gravel.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c9">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor wears a silver chain around his neck.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor is the mysterious client of the [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] has had sparring matches with [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor requires [[Shera]]'s service.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The blades are intended for service to [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor's death led to a desire for anarchy in the Empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor tells [[Meia]] she has the strength of a [[Pilgrim]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor is the father of the Empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor has living memories of the [[Great Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor killed [[Nakothi]] by driving a spear into her heart.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor can sense the memories and potential in objects.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor has lived for more than a thousand years.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor is the symbol of [[Imperial]] stability and civilization.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor can bind himself to the heart of a [[Great Elder]] without going mad.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor tells horror stories about the [[Great Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor has laid a hand on [[Shera]]'s knife.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor prepared [[Shera]] to deal with [[Nakothi]]'s tricks.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor wears white armor.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c22">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor is the [[Aurelian Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor claimed he could remake and reforge them to give them rebirth.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor's personal chambers were torn to pieces and spattered with human and inhuman blood.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor of the [[Aurelian Empire]] emits an [[aura]] of madness.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor uses an invested pillow to put people to sleep.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor's swords are ancient and invested with [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor broke [[Lucan]]'s legs by stomping on them.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor has performed feats like jumping from a hundred feet and dissolving a teacup with his will.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor relies on the power of his invested blades during combat with [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor believes the subject's disposition is unsuitable for a [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor states the subject is empathetic, clear-headed, has a strong moral compass, and questions everything.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Emperor put the former Watchman to sleep and left him there.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Having lived for almost two millennia, [[the Emperor]] is a figure who once escaped the [[Great Elders]] and took a name for himself. Throughout his long life, he explored the possibilities of [[Intent]], using it to bring inanimate objects to life, halt [[Elders]], and even drag a massive shark from the [[Aion Sea]]. Despite his immense power to destroy things or flare flames, he struggled with an inability to use the [[Optasia]] and faced the threat of Elder possession. While lounging on his skeletal metal throne, he instructed [[Shera]] to execute him if he ever lost control of himself. Ultimately, [[the Emperor]] was murdered by [[Shera]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor was murdered.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor believes no sacrifice is too great to prevent the rise of the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor has indicated his centuries-long life is coming to an end.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is a person who has explored the possibilities of [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is a character who has lived for almost two millennia.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor once sealed the [[Great Elder]] Ach’magut in an ancient [[library]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor's title is [[Your Imperial Highness]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is considered safe even if a hostile army were to appear on top of him.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is a target of [[Lucan]]'s squad.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is wearing layers of silk in every shade of blue.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor cannot use the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor can no longer protect his people.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor took a name for himself after escaping the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor has the ability to bring inanimate objects to life.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor has been training the [[Gardeners]] personally.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor once went insane in the belly of the dead island.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor's goal is to serve the Empire and the entire world.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor's words carry such [[Intent]] that it is impossible to ignore.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor has outlived everyone else in the history of the Empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is under threat of Elder possession.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor has the power to drag whomever they like.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor attempted to build particularly large or intricate Optasias in the past.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor's rooms are seen rarely by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor wears a simple, single-layered white robe.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor's real throne is a skeletal metal frame located behind a weapons rack in his rooms.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor instructs [[Shera]] to execute him if he is not in control of himself.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor was lounging in his cage-like throne.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor can use [[Intent]] to halt an Elder.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor was once a slave to the [[Great Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor has changed from what [[Ach'magut]] predicted.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor uses forceful [[Intent]] to destroy things.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor corrected Elder-related problems from his throne.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is praised by Yala.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor's eye sees all.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor can flex his [[Intent]] to cause sources of flame to flare to life.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor produced hazy bubbles in the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor once dragged a massive shark out of the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor's active [[Reading]] would have torn [[Shera]] to pieces if he were at full power.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor was killed by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is a figure who would be unable to follow the group through the mist.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Emperor is weakening and requires more personal attention for tasks.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|There is a baby Emperor that needs to be finished.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Once revered as [[the Liberator]] by those he saved, [[the Emperor]] served as the moral compass for the [[Guild]] and provided personal tutelage to individuals such as [[Loreli]]. Throughout his long existence, he carried a [[Great Elder]]’s heart for nearly two thousand years and even borrowed power from [[Nakothi]]. Although he had previously enhanced [[Shera]] and [[Lucan]] with his attention, he ultimately allowed himself to die via a knife-thrust and sawing motion at the hands of [[Shera]] for the Independent cause. His death occurred half a year ago, leaving the world to make its own decisions despite his prior determination regarding who should rule. Now a historical figure, [[the Emperor]]'s legacy remains tied to his teachings on ruthlessness and his personal connections to the [[Regents]] and [[Guild Heads]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] killed [[the Emperor]] for the Independent cause.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor was once called Liberator by the people he saved.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor is currently injured with a possible cracked rib, minor cuts, bruises, and a broken foot.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor claims to be [[the Emperor]] now.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] is armed with weapons belonging to [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor has old clothes.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor of humanity was killed by a knife-thrust and sawing motion.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor was killed half a year ago.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor borrowed power from [[Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor was the moral compass for the [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The real Emperor let himself die.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Architects]] would move up [[the Emperor]]'s timeline in service to him.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor's death left the world to make its own decisions.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor has already made a decision regarding who rules the world.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor knows the [[Regents]] and the [[Guild Heads]] personally.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor can hide [[Intent]] from [[Reading]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor wears armor.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor's helmet was struck by [[Bastion]]'s blade.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor enhanced [[Shera]] and [[Lucan]] with personal attention.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c17">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala was first contacted by [[the Emperor]] more than two years ago.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor is a historical figure.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] honed her talent under [[the Emperor]]’s tutelage.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor has carried a [[Great Elder]]’s heart for almost two thousand years.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The position of Emperor was previously held by only one person.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor is a figure [[Shera]] is used to being in the presence of.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor is potentially related to the strength of urges in [[Shera's shears]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor stated that before the [[Elders]], all men are allies.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor taught [[Shera]] precautionary tales about those who dealt with [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Emperor told [[Shera]] she needed to be ruthless.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“The Emperor has given us permission to do everything we can,” they’d said.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“That’s not possible,” Lucan whispered. “He’s Awakening the gravel.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“However, the spirit of a Champion will do you no good if you only have the strength of a Pilgrim.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“I can make them better. I can remake them, reforge them. I can give them rebirth.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c22" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|"His disposition is clearly unsuitable,"<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:The Guild]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Readers]]
